products.name: iPhone Aurora
products.summary: A flagship phone with pro cameras and all-day battery life.
products.description: iPhone Aurora combines a titanium-inspired body, advanced camera controls, fast performance, and a bright adaptive display for everyday creativity.

products.name: iPhone Mini Air
products.summary: Compact, lightweight, and powerful for students on the move.
products.description: A smaller phone for people who want premium performance, strong battery life, and a pocket-friendly design.

products.name: iPad Studio
products.summary: A creative canvas for design, notes, entertainment, and productivity.
products.description: iPad Studio supports multitasking, sketching, and content creation with a large laminated display and powerful processor.

products.name: iPad Learn
products.summary: A student-friendly tablet for classes, reading, and media.
products.description: iPad Learn focuses on affordability, portability, and long battery life for study and entertainment.

products.name: MacBook Proxima
products.summary: A high-performance laptop for developers, designers, and editors.
products.description: MacBook Proxima is designed for demanding creative and technical work with a fast chip, vivid display, and quiet thermal system.

products.name: MacBook Airlite
products.summary: Thin, fanless, and fast enough for everyday study and work.
products.description: MacBook Airlite delivers a refined laptop experience with a slim design, instant wake, and excellent battery life.

products.name: Watch Pulse
products.summary: A wellness companion with fitness tracking and notifications.
products.description: Watch Pulse helps users monitor workouts, stay connected, and build healthier habits through simple daily insights.

products.name: AirPods Orbit
products.summary: Wireless earbuds with immersive sound and active noise control.
products.description: AirPods Orbit provide rich audio, clear calls, and adaptive noise control in a pocketable charging case.

products.name: HomePod Wave
products.summary: A room-filling smart speaker for music, calls, and home controls.
products.description: HomePod Wave adapts audio to the room and provides voice controls for a connected home experience.

products.name: MagCase Clear
products.summary: A protective clear case with magnetic accessory support.
products.description: MagCase Clear protects the phone while preserving the original finish and supporting magnetic chargers.

products.name: Keyboard Flow
products.summary: A low-profile wireless keyboard for tablets and desktops.
products.description: Keyboard Flow offers comfortable typing, long battery life, and quick switching between devices.

products.name: Charger Duo
products.summary: A compact dual-device charger for desk and travel setups.
products.description: Charger Duo powers a phone and earbuds or watch together with a tidy foldable design.
